expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes
expectations.evidence: The result explicitly states the focus requirement and structures scenarios to cover it: "Focus requirement: Scenario drafting distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths, option combinations, and visible completion outcomes." It then provides separate scenarios for paths ("Scenario A — Primary path" and "Scenario B — Alternative path"), option combinations ("Scenario C — Option combination", "Scenario D", "Scenario E", "Scenario H"), and visible completion outcomes (success/failure/interruption/limits in Scenarios A, F, G, H), plus an explicit mapping section: "Distinguishes dashboard-level Google Sheets export paths: Scenarios A & B... Covers option combinations... Covers visible completion outcomes..."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The document is labeled and framed as Phase 4a scenario drafting throughout: title "# Phase 4a — Scenario Draft (Advisory)" and metadata "Primary phase under test: phase4a (scenario drafting)". Content is scenario definitions with goals, preconditions, steps, and expected outcomes—consistent with phase4a deliverable.
